examples: The fisherman rowed us back to the shore.
Spyros Latsis started his career as a humble fisherman in the Aegean.
With great difficulty, the fisherman manoeuvred his small craft close to the reef.
"The Fisherman of Pont-Sur-Seine, " exemplifies the power negotiations between a man and wife, says Mr. Dubin.
For a fly fisherman like Tusher there could be no finer place on earth.
